message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMinWidth 80
skinparam participantMaxWidth 200
skinparam participantMinHeight 40
skinparam participantMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMinFontSize 10
skinparam participantMaxFontSize 18
skinparam participantFontFamily "Arial"
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantFontDecoration none
skinparam participantFontUnderline false
skinparam participantFontStrike false
skinparam participantFontItalic false
skinparam participantFontBold false
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMinWidth 80
skinparam participantMaxWidth 200
skinparam participantMinHeight 40
skinparam participantMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMinFontSize 10
skinparam participantMaxFontSize 18
skinparam participantFontFamily "Arial"
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantFontDecoration none
skinparam participantFontUnderline false
skinparam participantFontStrike false
skinparam participantFontItalic false
skinparam participantFontBold false

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

note over ios2: SNS operation

halon -> ios2: m0_spie_repair_abort
destroy ios1
destroy ios2

loop until all IOS are in [IDLE,FAILED]
    halon -> ios2: repair status request
    ios2 --> halon: repair status reply
end

halon -> client: notify [(pool, PREVIOUS_STATE), (disk, PREVIOUS_STATE)]

@enduml
